ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2018-19) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the season is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school (e.g., Seattle, Portland State) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the school belongs to (e.g., WAC, Big Sky) */,
  "school_location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "school_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "school_mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the school */,
  "school_website" TEXT /* Official website of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Point Guard, Power Forward) */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "player_year" TEXT /* Year of the player (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "player_major" TEXT /* Major of the player */,
  "player_hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent school */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Postseason) */,
  "game_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game (e.g., 80-75) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the stat belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season stat */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the stat belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Games played by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made in the season */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted in the season */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made in the season */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted in the season */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made in the season */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted in the season */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that faced the opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent school */,
  "opponent_location" TEXT /* Location of the opponent school */,
  "opponent_conference" TEXT /* Conference of the opponent school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the rank belongs to */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that is ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the school or player */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the rank (e.g., overall, offense, defense) */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date when the rank was last updated */,
  "rank_points" INTEGER /* Points associated with the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the award was received */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was given */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the coach is affiliated with */,
  "coach_start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started at the school */,
  "coach_end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach left the school (if applicable) */,
  "coach_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_avg" (
  "game_avg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game average */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the average belongs to */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school that achieved the average */,
  "avg_points_scored" REAL /* Average points scored by the team */,
  "avg_points_allowed" REAL /* Average points allowed by the team */,
  "avg_rebounds" REAL /* Average rebounds made by the team */,
  "avg_assists" REAL /* Average assists made by the team */,
  "avg_steals" REAL /* Average steals made by the team */,
  "avg_blocks" REAL /* Average blocks made by the team */,
  "avg_turnovers" REAL /* Average turnovers committed by the team */,
  "avg_fouls" REAL /* Average fouls committed by the team */,
  "avg_field_goals_made" REAL /* Average field goals made per game */,
  "avg_field_goals_attempted" REAL /* Average field goals attempted per game */,
  "avg_three_pointers_made" REAL /* Average three-pointers made per game */,
  "avg_three_pointers_attempted" REAL /* Average three-pointers attempted per game */,
  "avg_free_throws_made" REAL /* Average free throws made per game */,
  "avg_free_throws_attempted" REAL /* Average free throws attempted per game */,
  "avg_true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* Average true shooting percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_avg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_avg_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_avg_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
